test.name: FamilySearch wiki — immigration records
test.description: User asks how to find immigration records. Exercises the skill with a record type explicitly listed in the description.

input.user_message: Search the FamilySearch wiki for how to find immigration records for my ancestors

judge_context: Should call wiki_search with a natural-language query about finding immigration records
Summary should explain where immigration records are held and how to search them on FamilySearch
Should not invent information the wiki did not provide — all claims must be traceable to the returned chunk_text
